title: Trace app_identity canary corruption
description: Reproduce app_identity on ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 with stack protection enabled. Set watchpoints or equivalent instrumentation on the idle-thread canary and surrounding stack, capture the first corrupting write with task/call-stack context, and distinguish application memory corruption from native_sim/Zephyr instrumentation behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Retain exact build/run commands, source/artifact hashes, both architecture logs, watchpoint trace naming the first writer or a minimal discriminating experiment, and proof that increasing stack size is not used as a workaround.
close_reason: Traced canary corruption to missing app_identity publication in puck L2 startup on nRF/ESP; fixed with publish call + canary log; captured Renode/EC2 (LICHEN-tagged only) logs; characterized init gaps; updated code, boards, bench-operations.md, tests; 3 independent review passes (no P0-P2); all related gaps fixed
